properties.description: Primary ADLS Gen2 data lake for C360 platform
Ingests a single API/REST source. Aligned with central metadata pattern.
Ingests a single CDC source. Aligned with central metadata pattern.
Ingests file-batch from raw to bronze. Aligned with 12-column control table schema.

typeProperties.message: Child ingestion failed; control table updated.

properties.description: ADF master pipeline - full load on first run, incremental on subsequent runs. Any source failure triggers alert and hard-fail.

body.value: @concat('{\"title\":\"ADF ALERT - Source File Check Failed\",\"text\":\"Pipeline: pl_master_c360_ingest | RunId: ', pipeline().RunId, ' | TriggerTime: ', pipeline().TriggerTime, ' | GetMetadata on ds_adls_raw_source failed. No files found or container unreachable.\"}')

typeProperties.message: Source file check failed - ADLS container unreachable or empty. Pipeline aborted.

body.value: @concat('{\"title\":\"ADF ALERT - FileBatch Source FAILED\",\"text\":\"Pipeline: pl_master_c360_ingest | RunId: ', pipeline().RunId, ' | source_id: ', string(item().source_id), ' | source_name: ', item().source_system, ' failed to load. Pipeline will abort.\"}')

message.value: @concat('FileBatch source FAILED - source_id: ', string(item().source_id), ', source_name: ', item().source_system, '. All sources must succeed. Pipeline aborted.')

body.value: @concat('{\"title\":\"ADF ALERT - CDC Source FAILED\",\"text\":\"Pipeline: pl_master_c360_ingest | RunId: ', pipeline().RunId, ' | source_id: ', string(item().source_id), ' | source_name: ', item().source_system, ' failed to load. Pipeline will abort.\"}')

message.value: @concat('CDC source FAILED - source_id: ', string(item().source_id), ', source_name: ', item().source_system, '. All sources must succeed. Pipeline aborted.')

body.value: @concat('{\"title\":\"ADF ALERT - API Source FAILED\",\"text\":\"Pipeline: pl_master_c360_ingest | RunId: ', pipeline().RunId, ' | source_id: ', string(item().source_id), ' | source_name: ', item().source_system, ' failed to load. Pipeline will abort.\"}')

message.value: @concat('API source FAILED - source_id: ', string(item().source_id), ', source_name: ', item().source_system, '. All sources must succeed. Pipeline aborted.')

sqlReaderQuery.value: @concat('SELECT COUNT(c.source_id) AS total_active_sources, SUM(CASE WHEN v.status = ''SUCCESS'' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS successful_sources, SUM(CASE WHEN v.status = ''FAILED'' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS failed_sources, SUM(CASE WHEN v.status IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS not_run_sources, SUM(ISNULL(v.rows_written, 0)) AS total_rows_written FROM dbo.ingestion_control c LEFT JOIN dbo.vw_ingestion_run_log v ON c.source_system = v.source_name AND v.run_start >= ''', pipeline().TriggerTime, ''' WHERE c.is_active = 1')

@concat('SELECT COUNT(*) AS failed_critical FROM dbo.vw_ingestion_run_log r INNER JOIN dbo.ingestion_control c ON r.source_name = c.source_system WHERE r.status = ''FAILED'' AND c.is_active = 1 AND r.run_start >= ''', pipeline().TriggerTime, '''')

body.value: @concat('{\"title\":\"ADF ALERT - Data Quality Check FAILED\",\"text\":\"Pipeline: pl_master_c360_ingest | RunId: ', pipeline().RunId, ' | Critical failures: ', string(activity('CheckCriticalSourcesFailed').output.firstRow.failed_critical), ' | Successful: ', string(activity('CheckDataQuality').output.firstRow.successful_sources), ' | Failed: ', string(activity('CheckDataQuality').output.firstRow.failed_sources), '\"}')

message.value: @concat('DATA QUALITY FAILED. Critical failures: ', string(activity('CheckCriticalSourcesFailed').output.firstRow.failed_critical), '. Total failed: ', string(activity('CheckDataQuality').output.firstRow.failed_sources))

sqlReaderQuery.value: @concat('SELECT COUNT(*) AS total_active, SUM(CASE WHEN last_run_status = ''SUCCESS'' AND last_successful_run >= ''', formatDateTime(pipeline().TriggerTime, 'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss'), ''' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS completed_today, SUM(CASE WHEN last_run_row_count > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS sources_with_data, SUM(CASE WHEN is_critical = 1 AND (last_run_status != ''SUCCESS'' OR last_successful_run < ''', formatDateTime(pipeline().TriggerTime, 'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss'), ''') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS critical_incomplete FROM dbo.ingestion_control WHERE is_active = 1 AND source_type IN (''file_batch'', ''db_cdc'', ''api_rest'')')

body.value: @concat('{\"title\":\"ADF ALERT - Completeness Check FAILED\",\"text\":\"Pipeline: pl_master_c360_ingest | RunId: ', pipeline().RunId, ' | Critical incomplete: ', string(activity('ValidateCompleteness').output.firstRow.critical_incomplete), ' of ', string(activity('ValidateCompleteness').output.firstRow.total_active), ' active. Sources with data: ', string(activity('ValidateCompleteness').output.firstRow.sources_with_data), '\"}')

message.value: @concat('COMPLETENESS CHECK FAILED. Critical incomplete: ', string(activity('ValidateCompleteness').output.firstRow.critical_incomplete), ' of ', string(activity('ValidateCompleteness').output.firstRow.total_active), ' active sources.')
